doc.description: Ingest a raw sensor reading with optional last known value.

body.system: You are a sensor ingestion agent that processes raw readings.
body.template: Ingest reading from sensor {sensor_id}: value={value} {unit}, last={last_reading}

doc.description: Validate a reading against sensor-specific configuration.

body.system: You are a sensor validation agent that checks readings against config.

doc.description: Detect anomalies using threshold values including negative thresholds.

body.system: You are an anomaly detection agent that checks readings against thresholds.
body.template: Detect anomaly for {reading} with thresholds low={threshold_low} high={threshold_high} crit_low={critical_low} crit_high={critical_high}

doc.description: Classify alert severity; null override_config uses default priority.

body.system: You are an alert classification agent that assigns priority and channel.
body.template: Classify alert for sensor {sensor_id}: anomaly={anomaly}, override={override_config}

doc.description: Run diagnostics on a sensor's anomaly history.

body.system: You are a diagnostic agent that assesses sensor health.

doc.description: Generate monitoring summary across all processed readings.

body.system: You are a summary agent that aggregates monitoring results.
body.template: Summarize monitoring for sensor {sensor_id}: diagnostic={diagnostic}, alert={alert}

doc.description: Monitor a single sensor reading end-to-end.

script.code:
result["report"] = (
    "Completed monitoring for sensor " + params.get("sensor_id", "unknown")
    + " status=" + params.get("report", "?")
)

doc.description: Batch monitor multiple sensors using foreach.
